questions.question: Explain the difference between a pipelined and non-pipelined addition circuit. Provide an example of each type.
questions.hint: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of each type

questions.question: A 4-bit binary number is represented in Gray code. What is the value of the 4-bit Gray code sequence?
questions.hint: Use the Gray code conversion table

questions.question: Describe the concept of parallel processing and explain how it differs from sequential processing. Provide an example of a digital system that uses parallel processing.
questions.hint: Use diagrams to illustrate the concepts
